terms.definition: Operational extension of Human identity for workforce coordination
Operational availability state influencing recommendations
Estimated workload from missions, tasks, and calendar
very_light through critical capacity band
Governed link between Human and mission work
Role Human plays on a mission assignment
Competency and certification eligibility check
Unified Human workspace answering what to work on next
Leader view of team capacity and mission distribution
Organization capacity without personal ranking
Extended fields for volunteer service preferences
Schedule and calendar-synced availability
Governed transfer of assignment authority
Filtered assignment states for Humans and leaders
Transparent explainable work priority
Private advisory workload warning
Celebration of contribution without competitive scoring
Critical role and backup personnel analysis
Human-approved development objective
Advisory recommendations requiring Human approval
